title: Fairmount Park - Seattle, WA - Niche
content: **#59** in Best Neighborhoods to Live in Seattle. Fairmount Park is a neighborhood in Seattle, Washington with a population of 6,819. Fairmount Park is in King County and is one of the best places to live in Washington. Living in Fairmount Park offers residents a dense urban feel and most residents rent their homes. In Fairmount Park there are a lot of bars, restaurants, coffee shops, and parks. Many young professionals live in Fairmount Park and residents tend to be liberal. The public schools in Fairmount Park are highly rated. ### About Fairmount Park... Based on the housing stock, population density, and the proximity of amenities of the area.
